somali.use_modus_ponens_p_q_and_p_gives_q: Isticmaal Modus Ponens: P→Q iyo P waxay siiyaan Q
somali.use_modus_tollens_p_q_and_q_gives_p: Isticmaal Modus Tollens: P→Q iyo ¬Q waxay siiyaan ¬P
somali.hs_chains_p_q_and_q_r_then_mp_with_p: HS wuxuu isku xiraa P→Q iyo Q→R, ka dibna MP P la
somali.disjunctive_syllogism_p_q_and_p_gives_: Qiyaas kala-saar: P∨Q iyo ¬P waxay siiyaan Q
somali.conjunction_gives_p_q_then_modus_ponen: Isku-daridku wuxuu siiyaa P∧Q, ka dibna Modus Ponens wuxuu siiyaa R
somali.chain_p_q_and_q_r_with_hs_then_again_w: Isku xir P→Q iyo Q→R HS, ka dibna mar kale R→S, ka dibna MP
somali.mt_on_p_q_gives_p_then_ds_on_p_r_gives: MT P→Q wuxuu siiyaa ¬P, ka dibna DS P∨R wuxuu siiyaa R
somali.hs_gives_p_r_then_mt_with_r_gives_p: HS wuxuu siiyaa P→R, ka dibna MT ¬R wuxuu siiyaa ¬P
somali.false_exclusive_disjunction: Kala-saar gaar ah oo been ah
somali.truth_tables_every_input_combination_e: Jadwalada runta — isku-darka gelinta kasta, soo-saarka kasta
somali.for_n_variables_the_table_has_2_rows_a: Doorsoomayaasha n, jadwalku wuxuu leeyahay saf 2ⁿ. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF — albaab kasta waa hal tiir kaliya. Aljabrada Boolean (Boole, 1854) waa aasaaska wareeg dijital kasta, weydiimo raadin kasta, iyo shuruud kasta oo koodhka ku jirta.
somali.proof_builder_derive_conclusions_step_: Dhisaha caddaynta — ka soo saar gunaanadyada tallaabo-tallaabo
somali.modus_ponens_modus_tollens_hypothetica: Modus ponens, modus tollens, qiyaas mala-awaal, qiyaas kala-saar — siddeedda xeer ee ka-soo-saarista waxay daboolaan inta badan lojikada hadalka ee hordhaca. Tallaabo kastaa waxay isku xaqiijisaa MAGAC, ma aha dareen.
somali.challenges_graded_tautology_contradict: Caqabadaha — halxiraalaha tautology iyo is-burin ee heerar leh
somali.tautology_always_true_contradiction_al: Tautology = had iyo jeer run; is-burin = had iyo jeer been; suurtagal = mararka qaarkood labadaba. Sharciga Aristotle ee aan-is-burinta (350 CK) waa sharciga ugu da'da weyn ee la daabacay. Tababarka AP CS Principles + hordhaca xisaabta gooni-gooni.
somali.nand_is_functionally_complete_you_can_: NAND si shaqo ahaan ah way dhammeystiran tahay — waxaad ka dhisi kartaa albaab kasta oo kale NAND oo kaliya. CPU casri ah wuxuu ku jiraa ku dhawaad transistor bilyan 10 oo fuliya isla xisaabta Boolean ee aad halkan ka dhisayso.
somali.probability_logic_inference_under_unce: Lojikada itimaalka — ka-soo-saarid hoos timaada hubin la'aan
somali.p_and_q_each_carry_a_probability_inste: P iyo Q mid kastaa wuxuu sitaa itimaal halkii uu noqon lahaa run/been adag. Dhacdooyinka madax-bannaan, P(P∧Q) = P(P) × P(Q). Eeg sida xadka kalsoonidu u beddesho itimaalka jilicsan oo u noqdo ka-soo-saaris gooni-gooni ah.
somali.drag_tiles_or_click_to_add: Jiid tijaabooyinka ama guji si aad ugu darto
somali.drop_symbols_here_or_click_above: Halkan ku rid astaamaha ama kor guji…
somali.toggle_english_and_formal_notation: U beddel inta u dhaxaysa qoraalka Soomaali iyo kan rasmiga ah
somali.enter_an_expression_above_to_generate_: Geli tibaax kor si aad u abuurto jadwalka runta
somali.drag_or_click_to_select: Jiid ama guji si aad u doorato
somali.drag_or_click_to_select_2: Jiid ama guji si aad u doorato
somali.loading_ai_content: Waxaa la soo rarayaa nuxurka AI
somali.ai_generated_is_this_argument_valid: AI ayaa abuuray: doodtani ma sax baa?
somali.can_we_conclude_the_butler_is_innocent: Ma gunaanadi karnaa in adeegaha uu yahay eedla'aan?
somali.can_we_conclude_the_creature_has_no_wi: Ma gunaanadi karnaa in xayawaanku uusan lahayn baalal?
somali.is_the_gold_in_cave_b: Dahabku ma ku jiraa Godka B?
somali.can_we_conclude_no_dark_clouds: Ma gunaanadi karnaa in aysan jirin daruuro madow?
somali.toggle_inputs_to_see_the_output_live: U beddel gelinta si aad u aragto soo-saarka si toos ah
somali.sliders_for_p_q_truth_probabilities_co: Sliders ee itimaalka runta ee P, Q iyo xadka kalsoonida. Natiijada ka-soo-saarista gooni-gooni ah ee 4 xaaladood. Dhibco ma jiraan, daah-furid ma jirto.
somali.independence_vs_correlation_when_does_: Madax-bannaani vs. xiriir — mid kastaa goorma ayuu khuseeyaa?
somali.how_does_threshold_change_inference_ou: Xaddu sidee buu u beddelaa natiijada ka-soo-saarista?
somali.design_note_discrete_4_state_inference: Qoraal naqshadeed: calaamad ka-soo-saaris gooni-gooni ah oo 4 xaaladood; dhibco itimaal ma jiraan; daah-furid ma jirto — ula kac.
somali.toggle_educational_panel_what_is_propo: U beddel guddiga waxbarasho: Waa maxay lojikada hadalka?
somali.propositional_logic_studies_how_the_tr: Lojikada hadalku waxay barataa sida runta hadallada adag ay ugu xidhan tahay kuwa fudud.
somali.is_any_statement_that_is_either_true_o: waa hadal kasta oo run ama been ah — sida «Roob baa da'aya» ama «2 + 2 = 4».
somali.argument_guarantees_the_conclusion_if_: doodu waxay dammaanad qaadaysaa gunaanadka HADDII aasaasyadu run yihiin.
somali.argument_fallacy_has_a_logical_gap_eve: doodu (qalad lojik) waxay leedahay daldaloolyo lojik — xitaa haddii aasaasyadu run yihiin, gunaanadku ma raaco si lama huraan ah.
somali.common_fallacies_affirming_the_consequ: Qaladaadka caadiga ah: xaqiijinta ka-dambeeya (P→Q, Q ∴ P✗), diidmada ka-horreysa (P→Q, ¬P ∴ ¬Q✗)
somali.truth_tables_boolean_logic_at_a_glance: 🔍 Jadwalada runta — lojikada Boolean hal jaalad
somali.truth_table_visualization_cycling_thro: Muuqaal jadwalka runta oo wareega albaabbada lojikada AND, OR, XOR iyo NAND.
